title: Smoky German Goose Fat Stir-fry
description: A vegetarian-friendly smoky and indulgent dish featuring goose fat, served as a quick side or snack.
instructions: Heat goose fat in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add sliced bell peppers and cook for about 5 minutes until they start to soften.
Stir in diced onions and cook for an additional minute, allowing them to caramelize slightly.
Next, add zucchini. Cook for another 3-4 minutes until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately as a side or snack.
